claim_boundary: A pass validates the exact symbolic packet algebra and reproducible process-isolation behavior under the committed harness. It is not a tamper-proof historical attestation against a malicious machine owner, does not cryptographically attest nonce entropy provenance, compares a full state with a rank-two control, and does not establish learned reasoning.
